title: Aranet Humidity Out of Range for Server Room RH Band
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-24h
| eval rh=tonumber(coalesce(humidity_pct, rh_pct, ""))
| eval loc=coalesce(location, zone, "")
| where (rh<40 OR rh>60) AND match(lower(loc), "(?i)server|idc|mdf|network")
| stats sparkline(avg(rh),1h) as rh_trend latest(rh) as humidity_pct by sensor_id loc
description: ASHRAE-style guidance for data halls often targets 40–60% RH to balance static and condensation risk.
value: Protects hardware from corrosion and static discharge in edge closets.
implementation: (1) Tag sensor locations. (2) Adjust RH band to site policy. (3) Correlate with cooling valves.
grandmaExplanation: We watch humidity in server rooms so air is neither too dry nor too damp.
